security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:1420; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420; font-src 'self' http://localhost:1420; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost http://localhost:1420 data: blob:; script-src 'self' http://localhost:1420; style-src 'self' http://localhost:1420 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: A complete desktop environment for Windows 11
bundle.longDescription: Gravity OS transforms Windows 11 with a multi-monitor desktop, native application dock, layouts, workspaces, scenes, rules, search, notifications, system controls, paired wallpapers and persistent light or dark appearance.
